setup: 10k INFANTRY attacker vs 10k MARKSMAN defender, Lv 6.0 (no skills/procs => DETERMINISTIC). SAME two players/stats as exp4 (only the DEFENDER's deployed class differs). Exact-fit Type-1 counter target.
counter: Marksman > Infantry (UNfavorable for the infantry attacker) - yet infantry WON, barely (its stat edge overcame the counter).
combat_stats: Attacker deploys INFANTRY (Atk199.2/Def192.0/Leth119.7/HP119.3) vs Defender MARKSMAN (Atk189.1/Def165.7/Leth131.2/HP128.6). Marksman has the counter + higher Leth/HP; infantry has higher Atk/Def. Infantry won 4.88% - a knife-edge.
engine_recon: def_k=1.0 + LIVE firing: engine picks the WRONG winner (marksman wins 52%) vs reality infantry wins 4.9%. The counter/lethality weighting over-credits marksman here. Fix the counter mechanic, no fudge.
